title: malus domestica var. api
intro: Malus domestica var. api, also known as the Api apple, is a specific variety of apple tree that is prized for its unique medicinal properties and health benefits. This plant is believed to have antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions, including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Malus domestica var. api include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, the bark, leaves, and fruit of the Api apple are used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
